address.title: Delivery address
address.description: Full delivery address used across all platforms.

query.title: Food query
query.description: Food or cuisine query, such as Chicken Pad Thai or sushi.

cartItems.title: Cart items
cartItems.description: Items the Actor should try to add to cart.

platforms.title: Platforms
platforms.description: Selected delivery platforms to scrape or compare from user-visible snapshots.

doorDashStoreUrls.title: DoorDash store URLs
doorDashStoreUrls.description: Optional DoorDash store URLs. When supplied, MealDeal calls tested Apify Store actors to extract DoorDash menu prices instead of relying only on the blocked DoorDash browser flow.

doorDashUseExternalActors.title: Use DoorDash Apify Store actors
doorDashUseExternalActors.description: Use external Apify Store actors for DoorDash menu data when possible. Disable only when testing the custom Playwright DoorDash flow.

userVisibleSnapshots.title: User-visible quote snapshots
userVisibleSnapshots.description: Optional normalized cart snapshots captured from a user's logged-in browser tab by the extension. When provided for a selected platform, the Actor compares this quote and skips live scraping for that platform.

maxCandidatesPerPlatform.title: Max candidates per platform
maxCandidatesPerPlatform.description: Maximum restaurant candidates to evaluate per platform.

debug.title: Debug mode
debug.description: When enabled, saves debug screenshots to the run key-value store.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional Apify Proxy or custom proxy configuration for live scraping.

platformProxyConfigurations.title: Platform proxy configurations
platformProxyConfigurations.description: Optional advanced per-platform proxy configurations keyed by ubereats, doordash, or grubhub.

proxyUrl.title: Custom proxy URL
proxyUrl.description: Optional advanced custom proxy URL used for all live scraping. Prefer Proxy configuration on Apify.

platformProxyUrls.title: Platform custom proxy URLs
platformProxyUrls.description: Optional advanced per-platform custom proxy URLs keyed by ubereats, doordash, or grubhub.
